group_count = 2
fragments = ["a", "foo ", None, "b", " bar", None]
clist = "nonempty"  # outer check passes
if clist is not None:
    result = [
        [name, clist.rstrip()] for name, clist in zip(
            fragments[::group_count+1],
            fragments[group_count::group_count+1]
        )
    ]
print(result)
